context.recommendation: 58 tasks aligned with roadmap. 14 P0 items remain (all Phase 0 production deployment/verification). 22 tasks completed since last sync — major progress on auth UI unification, store builder managed-service pipeline (intake API, store_builds CRUD, intake form), security hardening (csurf replacement, COEP, rate limiting), accessibility, testing (federation tests, ESLint), and checkout unification. Phase 1 AI Store Builder core is ~70% complete (renderer and Supabase persistence remain). Phase 1A managed-service intake is now functional. Next priority: Phase 0 production verification (Supabase env vars, live site testing) to unblock paid delivery.
